steps.title: Read the slope of line u
steps.content: Line $u$ is written as $y=2x+10$, so its slope is $2$.

steps.title: Use perpendicular slopes
steps.content: Perpendicular slopes are negative reciprocals. The negative reciprocal of $2$ is $-\frac{1}{2}$.

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content: The slope of line $w$ is $-\frac{1}{2}$, which matches the correct answer, C.
